sheets.name: README
rows: Defines all meal classes, class roles, slot applicability, diet metadata, weekday/weekend fit, complexity, heaviness, overlap resolution, and add-on-related class governance.
Generate weekly meal classes before dish recommendations.
Keep primary family meals separate from member-specific add-ons.
Do not invent new IDs in application code; manage changes through DOC-27/DOC-28.
Apply hard constraints before scoring and personalization.

sheets.name: Meal_Class_Overlap_Resolution
rows: Class describes a member-specific need or combo template, so it can wrongly replace the family main meal.
Moved out of main weekly rotation. Use only in Household_Addon_Component_Plan or as combo template; not a replacement for family main meal.
Use family breakfast class such as BF_POHA_CHIVDA_LIGHT / BF_UPMA_DALIA_SEVAI / BF_CHILLA_PROTEIN, then attach relevant add-on.

sheets.name: Addon_Component_Class_Master
rows: Ragi porridge; Suji kheer; Rice kanji; Mashed banana; Apple puree; Mashed sweet potato
No solids before 6 months; after 6 months add small soft semi-solid portion alongside family meal prep.
Mashed dal rice; Soft moong khichdi; Dal water rice mash; Lauki dal mash; Curd rice mash
Cook unsalted/low-spice portion separately before tempering family food.
Dal rice ghee; Mini phulka curd; Soft vegetable khichdi; Paneer bhurji small; Mild pulao
Same ingredients as family meal; less chilli, softer texture, smaller portions.
Mini idli; Paneer roll; Veg sandwich; Poha cutlet; Fruit curd; Dosa roll
Attach to family breakfast/snack; avoid turning whole family plan into child food.
Paneer bhurji; Curd bowl; Boiled egg if eaten; Dal chilla mini; Cheese dosa; Peanut chutney if safe
Use only where child needs extra acceptable protein or is picky.
Curd rice; Mild pasta with vegetables; Paneer roll; Mini paratha curd; Sweet corn chaat; Soft dosa
Bridge food linked to accepted textures; expose small portion of family sabzi separately.
Extra dal; Egg bhurji if eaten; Curd rice cup; Peanut chikki; Paneer sandwich; Chicken piece if eaten
Add to common meal without making all meals heavy for everyone.
Palak dal; Chana salad; Sprouts chaat; Beet-carrot kosambari; Egg curry if eaten; Fish curry if eaten
Use as side/component; do not double the entire household portion.
Curd bowl; Paneer bhurji; Ragi malt; Milk/dry fruit small; Moong dal chilla; Sesame laddoo small
Ajwain paratha piece; Methi laddoo small; Panjiri portion; Ragi malt; Gond laddoo milk; Moong chilla
Mother-specific snack; family meal remains normal.
Moong dal khichdi; Lauki dal; Ajwain paratha curd; Chicken soup if eaten; Dalia with ghee; Methi dal roti
Use regional postpartum rules; avoid spicy/oily family portions for mother if needed.
Moong dal soup; Soft paneer bhurji; Palak dal; Curd bowl; Egg drop soup if eaten; Fish stew if eaten
Soft add-on/side; not default whole-family khichdi.
Thin dal rice; Soft khichdi; Lauki soup; Idli sambar soft; Dalia; Curd rice
Add early/soft dinner for elder while family dinner can be normal.
Moong dal soup; Chicken soup if eaten; Fish stew if eaten; Dalia khichdi; Palak dal; Paneer soft scramble
Use for illness/recovery/surgery periods as temporary overlay.
Millet roti swap; Brown/red rice portion; Extra dal; Sprouts side; Salad before meal; Unsweetened curd
If only one member is diabetic, modify their plate; do not force family into diabetic main class.
Chana salad; Paneer cube side; Egg if eaten; Fish curry portion if eaten; Moong salad; Curd bowl
Attach to dal/roti/rice/sabzi meal; control rice/roti portion.
Unsalted curd; Kachumber no salt; Steamed veg; Lauki soup; Lemon herbs salad; Roasted chana small
Low salt/oil adjustment for target member.
Kachumber bowl; Sprouts salad; Curd bowl; Paneer/egg/chicken portion if eaten; Soup before dinner; Stir-fry veg
Adds satiety without replacing household meal.
Egg whites if eaten; Paneer bhurji; Greek-style curd; Chicken tikka if eaten; Soya chunks; Moong chilla
Protein add-on around normal meal timing.
Jain dal; Cucumber curd; Sev tamatar no onion; Dudhi chana; Jain paneer; Moong khichdi
Use if one Jain member in mixed household; if whole household Jain, hard filter main plan.
Sabudana khichdi; Fruit curd; Sama khichdi; Peanut potato; Makhana kheer; Rajgira roti
Add only for fasting member/day; not daily family class.
Pre-chopped veg list; masala base; dal soak reminder; no-chilli child portion; low-salt elder portion; lunchbox packing
Operational add-on for households with cook needing assistance.
Boiled dal base; Pre-cooked chole; Chopped bhindi; Roasted makhana; Curd set; Dough batch
Supports working women managing cook/office; not a meal class.
Nut-free chutney; Dairy-free curd alternative; Gluten-free roti; Egg-free protein side; Soy-free stir-fry; Shellfish-free seafood alt
Only after allergy capture; hard constraint overrides.

sheets.name: Implementation_Rules
rows: Every primary weekly class must exist in Meal_Class_Master_v3.
DB foreign key or application validation.
Add-on-only classes must not appear in weekly primary class columns.
Class/dish mapping must use meal_class_code, not class_name text.
Weekend/festive/fried classes should be limited by variety rules.
Diet incompatible classes must be filtered before dish expansion.
Classes with zero dish candidates should be flagged in admin QA.
